subcodes.first_line: O sincere servant of the Blessed Beauty! The services rendered at the time of the ascension of His Honour the Afnán of the Sacred Tree, Áqá Mírzá [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده صادق جمال ابهی خدماتی که در صعود حضرت افنان سدره مبارکه جناب آقا میرزا
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
